description: Baseline before parse optimizations. parse 3455µs, 15659 allocs.
Reuse ExpressionLexer (reset_source), frozen zero-arg IL instructions, assign regex→index. Parse 3455→3240µs (-6.2%), allocs 15659→14144 (-9.7%).
Live baseline on current machine. parse 3069µs. Pipeline: lex/parse/IL 3535µs (41%), structured_compile 4149µs (49%), iseq_eval 715µs (8%). 14184 parse allocs.
Frozen Expr constants (EXPR_NIL/TRUE/FALSE/ZERO/EMPTY/BLANK). Only EXPR_ZERO hit in benchmarks (21 of 1332 Expr allocs). 3077 vs 3069µs — within noise. Not worth the complexity.
